sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 69

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 69:1
items.html:
(to the question) MAN [Mayin Nukvin]
MAN means the Galgalta ve Eynaim of the lower one, which were cleaved in one degree with the fallen AHP of the upper one. Therefore, at the time of the upper one's Gadlut, when it has already returned its fallen AHP to itself and they have become its new NHY, the GE of the lower one are necessarily found in them as well, and there they are discerned as the discernment of MAN. Thus, every Partzuf that has already attained its discernment of Gadlut has the GE of its lower one cleaved to its NHY, serving it as MAN.
